name: Family Reunification Application
description: Family reunification application for family members of persons with recognized protection status. Process includes relationship verification, travel arrangements, and integration preparation.

regulations.title: Familiennachzug zu Deutschen
regulations.summary: Family reunification for family members of German citizens. Spouses and minor children have privileged status.

regulations.title: Ehegattennachzug
regulations.summary: Spousal reunification requirements including minimum age, language proficiency, and sufficient living space.

regulations.title: Kindernachzug
regulations.summary: Child reunification provisions for minor children. Different rules apply for biological children, adopted children, and stepchildren.

regulations.title: Nachzug der Eltern
regulations.summary: Parent reunification to minor children with refugee status. Strict requirements including dependency and humanitarian reasons.

regulations.title: Familiennachzug zu subsidiär Schutzberechtigten
regulations.summary: Family reunification for persons with subsidiary protection status. Limited number of visas per month.

validationRules.condition: Family relationship must be proven through official documents
validationRules.action: Verify marriage certificates, birth certificates against database, check for authenticity

validationRules.condition: Sponsor must have valid residence permit with reunification rights
validationRules.action: Check residence permit type, verify refugee status, confirm permit validity

validationRules.condition: Living space must meet minimum requirements per person
validationRules.action: Calculate square meters per person, verify rental agreement, check local housing standards

validationRules.condition: Sponsor must prove sufficient income to support family without public benefits
validationRules.action: Calculate income against benefit threshold, verify employment stability

validationRules.condition: Spouses usually need A1 German language certificate
validationRules.action: Verify language certificate, check for exemptions (hardship cases)

commonIssues.suggestion: Minimum 12 square meters per person required. Sponsor needs larger apartment or commitment to move.
A1 German language certificate required for spouse reunification. Apply for hardship exemption if impossible to obtain.
All foreign civil status documents need apostille or legalization and certified German translation.
